name: pylevate-dev
description: Dev dependencies for testing the framework's runtime JS (js/*.js) under jsdom. Not shipped; user projects have their own package.json.

scripts.test:js: node tests/js/md_smoke.mjs && node tests/js/ai_core_smoke.mjs && node tests/js/ai_runtime_smoke.mjs && node tests/js/runtime_jsdom.mjs
